title: Mbappe ruled out of Sevilla clash with muscle injury
summary: Real Madrid confirmed Kylian Mbappe will miss the Sevilla fixture after picking up a muscle injury in training, with Endrick set to start in his place.

title: Bayern sweat on double injury blow before Leverkusen top-of-the-table clash
summary: Alphonso Davies and Leon Goretzka are both confirmed out, forcing a reshuffle in Bayern's backline ahead of the visit of league leaders Leverkusen.

title: Inter Milan riding five-match winning run into Napoli showdown
summary: Simone Inzaghi's side have won five straight and the market has reacted, with Inter's price shortening sharply across bookmakers this week.

title: Napoli could rotate Lukaku after thigh complaint
summary: Romelu Lukaku trained separately from the group on Thursday and is a doubt for the trip to Inter, with Raspadori on standby to start.

title: Rodri to miss rest of season with ACL injury
summary: Manchester City confirmed Rodri's ACL injury will keep him sidelined for the remainder of the campaign, a significant blow ahead of the Liverpool fixture.

title: James a doubt for Chelsea's trip to the Emirates
summary: Reece James picked up a minor hamstring issue in training and is rated a doubtful starter against Arsenal this weekend.

title: Martinez to miss Champions League clash with Paris Saint-Germain
summary: Lisandro Martinez remains out with a long-term knee issue, leaving United short at centre-back for the trip to Paris.
